incidents.short_description: Elevated checkout failures; payment authorizations timing out.
incidents.root_cause: payment-api exhausted its Cosmos DB connection pool, so payment authorizations queued and timed out. The failures surfaced upstream as 5xx at checkout-api.
incidents.resolution: Reverted the connection-pool config to 100 and added an alert on pool saturation.

incidents.short_description: Inventory and catalog reads failing intermittently with 429s.
incidents.root_cause: cosmos-db hit its provisioned RU ceiling and began returning 429s, throttling inventory-api and catalog-api reads, which degraded availability checks at checkout.
incidents.resolution: Added the missing composite index, throttled the import job, and raised the RU floor.

incidents.short_description: Order notifications delayed; Service Bus queue depth climbing.
incidents.root_cause: notification-worker entered a crash loop on an undeserializable message and stopped consuming from service-bus. Queue depth grew unbounded and order notifications were delayed.
incidents.resolution: Rolled back the worker deploy, dead-lettered the poison message, and reprocessed the backlog.

incidents.short_description: checkout-api returning 500s shortly after this morning's deployment.
Checkout latency up and some carts/sessions dropping.
Reservation conflicts and oversells at checkout.
Order notifications delayed again; Service Bus queue depth climbing and not draining.
